title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to run Llama-2, CodeLlama, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client library for the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, list models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client (Node & browser) for Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (chat, multi-user, RAG, code highlighting) that talks to local Ollama.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API; chat, pull, delete, list, show, copy, create.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI chat tool with conversation history, markdown, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local LLM code completion via Ollama (GhostText/OpenAI adapter).

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama server and CLI; pinned builds for macOS/Linux.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK and minimal CLI for Ollama; supports chat, streaming, embeddings.

title: ollama-rag
summary: FastAPI service that adds retrieval-augmented generation on top of Ollama with ChromaDB.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-mistral
summary: PyPI helper that downloads and serves the Mistral-7b model via Ollama with one call.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot autoconfiguration and REST client for Ollama; inject ChatService beans.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async HTTP client for Ollama with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama using std.http; chat, pull, list, show endpoints.
